subject: Small white spherical robot with a single large red eye and disc-shaped appendages
description: A compact, roughly spherical white robot with stubby limbs and small round disc-like appendages for hands and feet. Its most prominent feature is a single large circular red eye dominating the face area. The robot is posed dynamically, appearing to be in motion or mid-gesture. The color palette is largely white and grey with the vivid red eye as a focal accent. The background is a light energy field with soft white and blue tones.
foreground: Spherical white robot with large red eye, disc appendages, dynamic pose
background: Soft white and blue energy field
emotion: Alert and animated, large eye suggesting expressive curiosity or alarm
